content: who is the Supreme Being Tawil is afraid from?

Tawil does not exist in the current world. Her existence would draw the attention of the "Supreme Will", so she cannot and must not exist. Wisdom and silence are all she can offer to these tireless seekers. In her daily vigil, she quietly bestows her wisdom, courage, and silent blessings upon the fate of humanity.
